summary: Recommendation-only experience profile validator for ritual interaction surfaces, manifestation form spectra, and revelation-bounded voice systems.
purpose: Validate theme descriptors, ritual state machines, manifestation form policies, revelation-only voice policies, phase rendering budgets, safe phase rotation policies, and reveal consistency for experience contracts without entering the deterministic core verdict path.

forbidden_expansion: Live visual verdicts based on network-dependent inputs.
Any mutation of user-facing runtime state from governance core.
scope: Validate JSON theme descriptors for emotional phase completeness and bounded semantics.
Validate ritual state machines for deterministic state coverage and safe degradation paths.
Validate declared manifestation form spectra so revealed figures remain bounded reveal privileges.
Validate revelation-only voice policies and opt-in microphone boundaries.
Check declared phase rendering budgets against governed thresholds.
Propose safe phase rotation policies from replay fixtures and trace-linked evidence.
Verify that reveal semantics remain consistent across declared gesture modes.
Validate that desktop and mobile gesture aliases normalize into a governed ritual sentence table.

forbidden_inputs: Network-fetched inputs on the deterministic path.
non_goals: Scoring live user emotion from raw sessions.
controls: Operate only on versioned JSON contracts, fixtures, and trace-linked evidence.
Remain recommendation-only and off the core deterministic verdict path.
Require architect approval for capability expansion beyond descriptor and replay validation.

evidence_contract.hash_policy: All validated descriptors, fixtures, and recommendations must remain sha256-referenced and replayable.
evidence_contract.trace_linkage: Every recommendation must map back to a trace-linked descriptor set, replay fixture, and review context.

change_log.change: Introduced the experience profile MCP for governed ritual interaction, manifestation spectrum validation, and revelation-bounded voice policy checks.
